case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2150.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-15-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. CLAIMANT RAFAEL CARRERA SHALL PROVIDE ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS, FIRST SET OF JUDICIAL COUNSEL FORM INTERROGATORIES AND FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: ARLENE BARTON; CLERK L. FONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. Based upon the briefs submitted, the Court rules as follows: Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion for Order for Terminating Sanctions and Striking Claim is Granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion to Compel Answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents; First Set of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is GRANTED. No Opposition filed. Claimant Rafael Carrera shall provide answers to Petitioner's First Set of Demand for Production and Inspection of Documents, First Set of Judicial Counsel Form Interrogatories and First set of Special Interrogatories within 15 days of the notice of this Order. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Arlene Barton; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
